scientific_question: Can A335's independently selected negative-half forecasts from diverse views be fused to predict the W45 Linf field better than the Linf forecast alone and then deploy unchanged at W46?

fusion_contract.training_sources: A335 alpha=-1/2 W45 forecasts constructed only from W43-W44 within each view
fusion_contract.training_target: complete target-blind W45 nearest_prototype_Linf field, read only after every candidate fusion order is constructed
fusion_contract.deployment_sources: A335 alpha=-1/2 W46 forecasts constructed only from W44-W45 within each view
fusion_contract.borda: ascending sum of named source ranks, then minimum rank, maximum rank, lexicographic named-view rank tuple, then cell
fusion_contract.prototype_median: ascending median rank across L1-Linf-L2, then rank sum, Linf rank, L1 rank, L2 rank, cell
fusion_contract.selection: maximum Spearman against complete target-blind W45 Linf, then minimum mean absolute rank error, then frozen eligible index
fusion_contract.deployment: apply the selected unchanged named-view fusion to the corresponding A335 W46 forecasts

predeclared_outputs: eight exact W45 fusion forecasts with complete-field metrics
one selected fusion under the frozen eligible-only rule
eight exact W46 fusion forecasts and one selected order hash
exact identity gates for every A335 source order
postconfirmation A325 rank panel without duplicate candidate execution
